    People also ask
    What are some popular dishes at Snuggery McHenry?
    Open year round, our family-owned roadhouse brings warm hospitality to both McHenry locals and visitors to the Chain O' Lakes. Enjoy favorites like our famous Pressure Fried Crispy Chicken, hand-breaded Wisconsin Cheese Curds, sizzling wings, stacked burgers, and Moretti's award-winning Chicago-style pizza.
